description.unified: Deals ATK Magic DMG 3 time to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and stuns them for [3 sec->1.8sec].

Creates [Belladonna Seed] in the area around the target for [10 sec->7sec]. [Belladonna Seed]: Deals ATK Magic DMG to nearby enemies every [2 sec->1sec] and reduces Healing Rate by [30%->25%] for [5 sec->1sec]. [(removed) increasing M.DMG the target takes by 30%]
Deals ATK Magic DMG 6 time to enemies in a wide frontal area and knocks them down for [3 sec->1sec].
On Normal and Skill Attacks, inflicts [Poison] on the target, dealing Magic DoT every 1sec for 20sec and reducing Healing Rate by [5%->1%]. This effect stacks up to [5 times->25 times].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%. [(removed) Recovers own Mana by 250 upon a Critical Hit]
Enemies hit suffer increased status ailment duration by [30%->20%] for 5 sec.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->1000], but damage increases by 100%.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.

light.unified: For each [Poison] stack, the target's Attack is reduced by [5%->1%].

dark.unified: If the target is a boss, [Poison] damage increases by [x3->100%].

description.unified: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0} sec.
[Seed of Belladonna] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, Mana of hit enemies by {0}, and recovers own Mana by [{1}->{2}].
[Wrath of the Forest] Increases DMG by {0}%. Upon a Crit Hit on enemies with [over 5->5 or more] stacks of Poison, reduces Cooldown by 4%.
[Poison] makes Poison effect irremovable and increases DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%. [(removed) target takes {0}% increased M.DMG]

dark.unified: At the start of battle, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [20%->10%] for 90 sec. The damage increase stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 7 sec, deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to poisoned enemies, reduces their Magic Defense by {1}% for 10 sec, and increases their Magic Damage taken by {2}%.

Summons the soul of World Tree’s Will, Roburu for 10sec, dealing M.DMG to a random enemy every 2sec, increasing M.DMG taken by 30% for 10sec, and inflicting Shackle for 2sec. Also recovers 500 Mana every 2sec. [(removed) reduces Cooldown of all Skills by 1 sec every 2 sec]

1.from: Increases own ATK by 50% for the duration of soul.
1.to: Increases own ATK by 45% for the duration of soul.
1.unified: Increases own ATK by [50%->45%] for the duration of soul.

2.from: Increases the duration of CC effects applied upon enemies by 30% and reduces thier M.DEF by 25% for the duration of soul.
2.to: For the duration of the soul, increases the duration of CC effects taken by all enemies by 30%.
2.unified: For the duration of the soul, increases the duration of CC effects taken by all enemies by 30%. [(removed) reduces thier M.DEF by 25%]
